titles.title: He Has Chosen Me for You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We don't know what tomorrow holds, but we know who holds tomorrow Knowing this we'll live above the world and all its sorrows I have prayed for all my life that we would be together Serving Him together seems so right

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, oh yes, it's true He has chosen me for you Take my hand and we'll agree That He has chosen you for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now and then I like to think about the day He saved me All the love that He bestowed and all the gifts He gave me With all this I praise His name for putting us together He knew we'd be together from the start

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God has saved us Washed us white as snow And now we're together Cause He has made it so

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, oh yes, it's true He has chosen me for you Take my hand and we'll agree He has chosen you He has chosen you He has chosen you for me
